text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Summer camp is here again. We're<n>heading into a
crucial preparation<n>period for the upcoming fall
senior G1<n>races.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
This year... Just for this year... I've<n>got to hold off
on my comic prep!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
This summer, I need to focus all my<n>energy on
preparing for the autumn<n>Tenno Sho! So King's
new volume<n>will have to be pushed back to
winter...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Oh my. And I was so looking forward<n>to reading it.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Hyagh! King?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Sorry! I'm so sorry! I promise the<n>winter special
won't disappoint!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I suppose it's fine. Running in the<n>autumn Tenno
Sho is more important,<n>after all.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Th-thank you. You've helped me so<n>much, and
now I'm finally going up<n>against Opera O and
Doto!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: That's right. All three of you are<n>competing.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Although, there might be a fourth<n>racer to look out
for.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Huh? A fourth? Is there someone<n>else people
have been talking about?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
As a matter of fact... there's a rather<n>surprising
addition, from what I hear.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
You might know her. She won this<n>year's NHK
Mile Cup.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Whaaah?! You don't mean the girl<n>who was
number four, do you?! The<n>classic-year cutie?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Oh, so you do know her? She may be<n>in her
classic year, but people are<n>expecting she'll be
contending in the<n>senior medium-distance races
before<n>long.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Make sure she doesn't trip you up,<n>okay? Ta-ta
for now.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Wh-wh-wh-what the?! Number four<n>coming out of
nowhere! Is she an<n>enemy?! Is she a friend?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Were you listening, Trainer?! She'sgonna be there!
choice_data_list:
Seems like we have another strong competitor on
our hands.

Seems like we have another strong competitor on
our hands.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: YES! But more than that...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
My heart... is aflame! I can't believe<n>the day we
can run together is so<n>close!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
There's so much I want to show her<n>on the
racecourse! Just like how King<n>showed so much
to me!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I want her to know the potential of<n>Umamusume
and the magnificence of<n>the Twinkle Series. I just
have to<n>show her!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
WOOO! I can feel my inner big sister<n>budding from
within!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Our spirits surge at the news of this<n>unexpected
new challenger joining<n>the autumn Tenno Sho.
